dates.summary: Google Research introduced ReasoningBank, a new framework for letting agents learn from prior experience, signaling continued movement toward memory-augmented, self-improving agent systems. Anthropic and AWS expanded enterprise distribution by bringing Claude Cowork and Claude Code Desktop to Amazon Bedrock, while ByteDance Seed surfaced multiple new artifacts including Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM. On the research side, a new arXiv paper reported that harmful intent can be linearly recovered from residual streams across 12 models, a potentially important result for model monitoring and safety tooling.
